architecture_notes: Combined strategy: strong augmentation (flip, rotation 0.15, zoom 0.15, contrast 0.15, brightness 0.1) + BatchNorm after every Conv2D + He normal initialization + graduated dropout (0.5 + 0.3) + grayscale dataset. Uses proven training settings (Adam 1e-4, ReduceLROnPlateau, longer patience=15). Designed to maximize accuracy on this extremely small (838 training images) fine-grained fracture classification task.
